bash -c 
  cd 'B:/develop/moat/projects/3/src/cuda'
  export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
  HIPCC='B:/develop/TheRock/external-builds/pytorch/.venv/Lib/site-packages/_rocm_sdk_devel/bin/hipcc'
  HIPCCFLAGS='-O3 -Wall -Werror -Wno-bitwise-instead-of-logical --genco -include hip/hip_runtime.h -I.'
  
  # Compile all .cu files in parallel (up to 32 jobs)
  compile_cu() {
    local cufile="$1"
    local base="${cufile%.cu}"
    rm -f "${base}"_*.co
    $HIPCC $HIPCCFLAGS --offload-arch=gfx1201 "$cufile" -o "${base}_gfx1201.co" 2>&1
    local exit_code=$?
    if [ $exit_code -eq 0 ]; then
      echo "  OK: ${base}_gfx1201.co"
    else
      echo "  FAIL: $cufile (exit $exit_code)" >&2
      exit $exit_code
    fi
  }
  export -f compile_cu
  export HIPCC HIPCCFLAGS
  
  ls *.cu | xargs -P32 -I{} bash -c 'compile_cu "$@"' _ {}

bash -c 
export GOROOT=/var/lib/jenkins/goroot

export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0

make CUDA_CC=gfx1100
echo "=== Make exit $? ==="
cd ..

echo "=== Build exit $? ==="

bash -c cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/3/src/test && for s in demag2D.mx3 cubicanisotropy.mx3 anisenergyconservation.mx3 dmi.mx3; do echo "=== $s ==="; HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 /var/lib/jenkins/go/bin/mumax3 -cache /tmp -http "" "$s" 2>&1 | grep -iE ": OK|FAIL|expect|panic|error" | grep -v "deprecated" | head -6; done
